discovery_summary.findings: All three CLI commands (retry, kill, logs) are fully implemented with comprehensive tests. The spec asks to implement them, but they already exist in the codebase.

patterns.command_enum_pattern: Commands are defined as enum variants in main.rs Command enum (lines 42-225)
patterns.command_handler_pattern: Command handlers are async functions in cards.rs (cmd_retry, cmd_kill) and logs.rs (cmd_logs)
patterns.testing_pattern: Unit tests are co-located in the same file within #[cfg(test)] mod tests blocks

existing_implementations.description: All three commands are fully implemented
relevant_files: crates/bop-cli/src/main.rs (Command enum variants: Retry, Kill, Logs at lines 105-122)
crates/bop-cli/src/cards.rs (cmd_retry at line 511, cmd_kill at line 569)

retry.functionality: Moves failed cards to pending, increments retry_count, clears failure_reason, resets failed stages

kill.functionality: Sends SIGTERM to running agent PID, moves card to failed with reason='killed'
kill.implementation_note: Uses tokio::process::Command with 'kill -TERM' instead of nix::sys::signal (simpler approach)

logs.functionality: Streams stdout/stderr logs with optional --follow mode, colorized output, stops when card leaves running state

blocking.impact: make check fails, blocking acceptance criteria
blocking.relation_to_spec: UNRELATED - This test is about dispatcher adapter path resolution, not about retry/kill/logs commands

spec_discrepancies.description: Spec says commands are 'missing' but they are fully implemented
possible_reasons: Spec was written before implementation was completed
Previous implementation attempts failed (old cards in .cards/team-cli/failed/) and spec wasn't updated
